name: Mila's Aroz Con Pollo
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken in the criollo sauce overnight in the fridge. Shrimp can also be added.
2. In a large pan, heat a little oil and sauté the bell pepper and onion until just tender. Add the rice to coat with a small amount of oil.
3. Add the beer, tomatoes, turmeric, saffron, and yellow food coloring (if using) to the pan. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Add the drained chicken to the pan, cover, and simmer on very low heat until the rice is cooked and separate, approximately 15 minutes.
5. Add the drained green olives, frozen peas (which will cook in the rice), and pimientos. If increasing the amount of rice, add chicken stock to cover about 1 inch. This dish is versatile and suitable for company, making it a pretty choice.
